project_scope: lattice-based anonymous authentication backend, not a general-purpose anonymous credential system
not_yet_machine_checked: A project-specific compiler that converts the SHA-256 bit relation into native LaZer constraints
A complete UC theorem with simulator and composition proof
paper_safe_claim: v2.0 adds a standard SHA-256 fullrelation checker and auth-token/nullifier/refresh digest relations around the LaZer algebraic core; it is a route-B full-relation engineering branch, not yet a machine-checked UC-secure production anonymous-authentication library.
